creator: sailorfred@yahoo.com
text:
Thanks very much, those look great.  I approve the revised patches.

Fred


----- Original Message ----
From: Frederic Culot <culot@FreeBSD.org>
To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; Fred Cox <sailorfred@yahoo.com>; Ryan Steinmetz 
<rpsfa@rit.edu>
Sent: Sun, June 5, 2011 1:53:23 AM
Subject: Re: ports/157436: [update] www/p5-WWW-Contact to 0.43

Hi Ryan and Fred,

thanks for submitting and reviewing this patch.
However I have some suggestions to make and I have prepared an updated
patch you might want to consider:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/files/p5-WWW-Contact.diff

Here are the modifications I applied:

- I used the CPAN:USER macro for MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR
- I added the license (same as for Perl)
- I added the 2 following dependencies:
1) p5-HTML-Parser to get HTML::Entities, this was already a dependency
for p5-HTML-Tree but I believe it is better to mention it explicitely
2) p5-Net-DNS to get Net::DNS::Resolver which seems to be a new
dependency according to the vendor's changelog

You can find the tinderbox log corresponding to my patch here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/p5-WWW-Contact-0.43.log

If you approve the changes I made then I will commit the updated patch.

Thanks,
Frederic
